gold_change_reason: Seed solution did not skip comment lines, empty lines, or enforce exact part counts in YAML parsing. Updated parsing functions to handle these D-axis and C-axis requirements.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the new input/data complexity introduced by this operator.
Scaled executable cases must expose the new computation and contract constraints introduced by this operator.
implementation_notes: Modified parse_exchange_table_file to skip lines that are empty or start with '#' after stripping whitespace.
Modified parse_exchange_yaml_file to skip similar lines and only accept exactly 3 or 4 colon-separated parts.
Missing compartment in YAML (3 parts) uses default_compartment as before.
Malformed lines with extra fields are skipped.
